description_long: This is a sleek, modern sedan with a low, aerodynamic profile and a glossy black exterior. The windows are tinted and the roof features a subtle sunroof outline. The car has four doors, with smooth, flush handles and a streamlined body shape. The wheels are black with turquoise rims and a multi-spoke design, adding a sporty accent to the overall look. Both the front and rear have license plates, with the rear plate reading 'PGH112', and the rear features dual exhausts and distinctive LED-style taillights. The side of the car displays a subtle graphic, and the overall design suggests a high-performance, luxury vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A glossy black, modern sedan with tinted windows, turquoise-rimmed wheels, and sporty, streamlined features. It has four doors, dual exhausts, and distinctive front and rear license plates.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, low hood, large windshield, and front license plate with sleek headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door layout, turquoise-rimmed wheels, and a subtle side graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rear license plate 'PGH112', dual exhausts, and LED-style taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four-door design and turquoise-rimmed wheels without the side graphic.
attribute_license_plate: Front and rear license plates present; rear plate is yellow with black text 'PGH112', front plate is white with unreadable text.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke black wheels with turquoise rims and a sporty, modern appearance.
